paper_title: Species Identification of Pinus Pollen Found in Belukha Glacier, Russian Altai Mountains, Using a Whole-Genome Amplification Method

methods.description: Process for collecting Pinus pollen samples from the Belukha glacier for DNA analysis.

steps.description: In the summer of 2003, a 4-m-deep pit on the plateau of the glacier was examined (4100 m a.s.l.). Pinus pollen grains in a snow sample were obtained at a depth of 1.8-1.9m in the pit and used for the DNA analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: collect Pinus pollen samples from glacier pit for DNA analysis

steps.description: The Pinus pollen concentration in the sample was 34,900 grains L −1. The sample was dated to the summer of 2002 by counting the seasonal distribution of pollen.
steps.searchable_summary: determine pollen concentration and date sample

steps.description: The sample was kept in a frozen state until it was analyzed.
steps.searchable_summary: store pollen sample in frozen state
